premium-white-onion-flakes.title: Premium White Onion Flakes
premium-white-onion-flakes.desc: Ethically sourced and surgically processed using advanced low-heat dehydration technology to preserve the natural pungent aroma and flavor profile of fresh Indian White Onions.
longDesc: Our Dehydrated White Onion Flakes are produced from the finest quality white onions grown in the rich agricultural belts of Gujarat. We employ a multi-stage cleaning and sorting process, utilizing state-of-the-art optical sorters to ensure zero impurities.
The dehydration process is strictly monitored to keep moisture levels below 4.5%, ensuring a crisp texture and long-lasting freshness without the need for artificial preservatives.

applications.title: Canned Foods
applications.desc: Ideal for soups, sauces, and ready-to-eat meals due to high rehydration capacity.

applications.title: Seasoning Blends
applications.desc: Perfect base for spice mixes, seasoning salts, and snack coating powders.

applications.title: QSR & Catering
applications.desc: Convenient storage and rapid preparation for high-volume commercial kitchens.

applications.title: Food Processing
applications.desc: Used in processed meat products and vegetable mixes for texture and flavor.

dehydrated-garlic-powder.title: Dehydrated Garlic Powder
dehydrated-garlic-powder.desc: Premium dehydrated garlic powder with strong aroma profile, perfect for spice blends and sauces.
longDesc: Premium quality garlic powder made from carefully selected dehydrated garlic cloves.
Maintains strong aroma and flavor characteristics throughout processing.
